title: Robust charge-density wave strengthened by electron correlations in monolayer 1T-TaSe2 and 1T-NbSe2

paper_analysis.summary: This paper studies monolayer 1T-TaSe2 and 1T-NbSe2 grown by MBE on bilayer graphene using ARPES, STM, core-level photoemission, and time-resolved ARPES. The main finding is that both monolayers host a robust charge-density-wave–Mott insulating phase with a much higher transition temperature than bulk, and that the lower Hubbard band survives heating and electron doping, consistent with strengthened electron correlations and reduced interlayer hopping in 2D.

paper_analysis.raw_measurement_details: The paper reports raw experimental measurements including ARPES intensity maps, STM topographs, Ta 4f core-level spectra, and time-resolved ARPES data. Samples were grown by MBE on bilayer graphene/6H-SiC, then measured in UHV; ARPES used He lamp and synchrotron radiation, STM used constant-current imaging, and time-resolved ARPES used pump-probe laser excitation.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: The paper includes processed/derived outputs such as Fourier transforms of STM images, second-derivative ARPES maps, EDCs extracted at specific k-points, leading-edge midpoint analysis versus temperature, intensity ratios IEF/ILHB versus K coverage, and band dispersions obtained by tracing peak positions in EDCs.

dataset_characterization.data_availability_statement: The paper states that the data supporting the findings are available from the corresponding author upon reasonable request.
dataset_characterization.raw_data_description: Raw data are described only at the level of measurement modalities and instruments: ARPES spectra/maps, STM images, core-level photoemission spectra, and time-resolved ARPES traces collected on monolayer films grown by MBE. No file formats, repository, or public raw-data archive are mentioned.
dataset_characterization.processed_data_description: Processed data include EDCs, second-derivative ARPES images, Fourier-transformed STM images, extracted band dispersions, leading-edge midpoint values, fitted BCS-like gap curves, and intensity ratios versus doping. These are shown in figures but no tabulated dataset is described in the text.
dataset_characterization.figure_data_description: Figure-specific source data are not explicitly mentioned in the paper text. The figures appear to be generated from experimental measurements and subsequent analysis, but no statement about deposited source-data files is given.
dataset_characterization.scripts_description: No analysis scripts, notebooks, or code repositories are mentioned.
dataset_characterization.replot_reason: The paper does not indicate that raw data, source-data files, or analysis scripts are publicly provided. Only a request-to-corresponding-author data availability statement is given, so the figures are not directly replot-ready from the paper text alone.
dataset_characterization.notes: The paper clearly distinguishes raw measurements from derived quantities in the narrative: raw ARPES/STM/core-level spectra are analyzed into EDCs, second derivatives, Fourier transforms, and fitted gap metrics. Supplementary notes are referenced repeatedly for additional analysis, but the supplementary dataset contents are not described in the provided text. The only explicit availability statement is author-request based, which usually implies no open repository in the article text.

classification_prior.raw_data_evidence: The Methods section describes direct experimental acquisition of ARPES, STM, core-level photoemission, and time-resolved ARPES data.
classification_prior.source_data_evidence: No explicit mention of deposited source-data files, figure source data, or public processed-data archive appears in the provided text.
classification_prior.data_availability_section_relevant: “The data that support the findings of this study are available from the corresponding author upon reasonable request.”
classification_prior.review_notes: Be careful not to classify derived plots as raw data. The paper contains many processed/derived quantities, but no explicit open raw dataset or source-data package is described. Supplementary notes are referenced for methodological details, but their contents are not available in the provided text.
